zh.lifeSummary: 當John Diffee Sr於1764年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州路雲時，他的父親William Diffee Jr32歲，母親Elizabeth Ann York38歲。他於1788年10月12日與Sarah Jane Swafford在美國北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1830年住在美國田納西州亨德森。他去世於1835年2月5日在美國田納西州切斯特亨德森享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Diffee Sr于1764年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州路雲时，他的父亲William Diffee Jr32岁，母亲Elizabeth Ann York38岁。他于1788年10月12日与Sarah Jane Swafford在美国北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1830年住在美国田纳西州亨德森。他去世于1835年2月5日在美国田纳西州切斯特亨德森享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Diffee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Diffey  . Compare   Defee  .

History: William Diffee, from whom present-day American bearers of this name are descended, was born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, and died in 1790 in Randolph County, NC. His surname was also spelled Diffey, while his descendants also bear the surname Defee .

variants.name: Diffey
meanings: English (Dorset): perhaps a nickname from Anglo-Norman French defaé, defieu ‘faithless, disloyal’. Compare Diffee .

variants.name: Defee
meanings: History: This surname is borne by the descendants of William Diffee, born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, died 1790 in Randolph County, NC. The same spelling is recorded in London, England, in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Tennessee Becomes a State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1796, Tennessee became the 16th state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Tennessee Secretart of State-From Territory to State

historicEvents.description: France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: The U.S doubles in size
historicEvents.description: The United States purchased all the Louisiana territory (828,000 sq. mi) from France, only paying 15 million dollars (A quarter trillion today) for the land. In the purchase, the US obtained the land that makes up 15 US states and 2 Canadian Provinces. The United States originally wanted to purchase of New Orleans and the lands located on the coast around it, but quickly accepted the bargain that Napoleon Bonaparte offered.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: The Hermitage is Built
historicEvents.description: The Hermitage located in Nashville, Tennessee was a plantation owned by President Andrew Jackson from 1804 until his death there in 1845. The Hermitage is now a museum.

en.lifeSummary: When John Diffee Sr was born in 1764, in Rowan, North Carolina, British Colonial America, his father, William Diffee Jr, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann York, was 38. He married Sarah Jane Swafford on 12 October 1788, in North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Henderson, Tennessee, United States in 1830. He died on 5 February 1835, in Henderson, Chester, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Diffee Sr est né en 1764, à Rowan, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Diffee Jr, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann York, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Jane Swafford le 12 octobre 1788, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Henderson, Tennessee, États-Unis en 1830. Il est décédé le 5 février 1835, à Henderson, Chester, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.Rowan, North Carolina, British Colonial: Rowan, North Carolina, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als John Diffee Sr 1764 in Rowan, North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Diffee Jr 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ann York 38. Er hat am 12. Oktober 1788 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Sarah Jane Swafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1830 hat er in Henderson, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 5. Februar 1835 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Henderson, Chester, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Diffee Sr è nato il nel 1764 nel Rowan, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Diffee Jr, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Ann York, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Jane Swafford il 12 ottobre 1788, nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Henderson, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1830. Morì il 5 febbraio 1835, nel Henderson, Chester, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Diffee Srが1764年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ロワンで生まれた時，父William Diffee Jrは32歳，母Elizabeth Ann Yorkは38歳であった。1788年10月12日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州でSarah Jane Swaffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1830年にはアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ヘンダーソンに住んでいた。彼は1835年2月5日にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州チェスターヘンダーソンで71歳で死去した。

ko.Rowan, North Carolina, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 로원
ko.lifeSummary: John Diffee Sr(이)가 1764년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 로원에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Diffee Jr(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann York(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1788년 10월 12일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Sarah Jane Swafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1830년도에 미국 테네시 주 헨더슨에서 살았다. 그는 1835년 2월 5일 미국 테네시 주 체스터 헨더슨에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Diffee Sr nasceu em 1764, em Rowan, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Diffee Jr, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ann York, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Jane Swafford em 12 de outubro de 1788, em Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Henderson, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América em 1830. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1835, em Henderson, Chester, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos.

ru.Rowan, North Carolina, British Colonial: роуань, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Diffee Sr родился в 1764 г. в местности роуань, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Diffee Jr было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann York, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Jane Swafford 12 октября 1788 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности хендирсон, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в 1830 году. Он умер 5 февраля 1835 г. в местности хендирсон, честир, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год.
